name: Avetta Contractor Management API
what_it_does: Avetta REST API for contractor and supplier qualification management platform. Enables AI agents to manage contractor prequalification status retrieval for supply chain risk management, handle contractor safety performance and incident rate data access, retrieve insurance certificate verification and compliance status for contractor onboarding, manage contractor training and certification tracking data, handle contractor site access authorization and badging data, access supplier sustainability and ESG qualification data, retrieve contractor diversity and MWBE certification status, manage contractor financial health and capacity data, handle regulatory compliance and license verification status, and integrate contractor qualification data with procurement, ERP, and HSE management systems.
use_cases: Verifying contractor qualifications from procurement automation agents
Checking safety compliance from contractor onboarding agents
Monitoring insurance certificates from risk management agents
Screening contractor ESG from sustainable procurement agents
not_for: Internal employee management without contractor and supplier focus
Simple vendor onboarding without safety prequalification requirements
Consumer services without enterprise contractor risk management
best_when: An enterprise using Avetta to manage contractor qualification and safety compliance wants AI agents to automate contractor screening, safety data retrieval, insurance verification, and site access authorization.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Contractor qualification data is used for safety-critical site access decisions — automated access authorization based on qualification data without safety officer review creates liability. Insurance certificate automation must validate coverage limits and names; certificate automation errors create uninsured liability. Contractor safety incident data automation that bypasses manual review can approve high-risk contractors.

auth.notes: Avetta uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at avetta.com/developers. Webhooks for qualification events. REST API with JSON. Lehi, Utah HQ. Private ($350M+ raised). Contractor management network with 150,000+ qualified contractors. Strong in energy, construction, and manufacturing. Competes with ISNetworld and Veriforce for contractor management market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per contractor network size
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription for hiring clients; contractor self-service qualification fees
pricing.notes: Lehi, Utah. Founded 2000. Private ($350M+ raised). Contractor management and supply chain risk market. 150,000+ qualified contractors. 1,000+ enterprise clients in energy, construction, and manufacturing. Strong in oil & gas and utilities. Competes with ISNetworld for contractor management platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: Automated contractor site access authorization from qualification data requires safety officer review; qualification scores don't capture site-specific safety requirements

Insurance certificate validation — automated insurance verification must validate coverage amounts, named insured, and policy period; certificate automation without field validation creates uninsured liability
Qualification score interpretation — Avetta qualification scores aggregate multiple factors; automated pass/fail decisions from score alone may miss critical safety deficiencies
Contractor self-service delays — contractor qualification completion depends on contractor action; automated onboarding workflows must account for contractor response latency
Geofence site access — site access badging features have geofence configuration; validate site configuration before automated access authorization
Network effect — Avetta qualification data is only for contractors in the Avetta network; contractors not in the network require manual qualification
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contractor qualification and safety. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA/AU. Contractor qualification and safety data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Contractor management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/CA. Contractor qualification and insurance data.
